narrative:
Fairport Harbor Ex Vill Sd (Lake) exempted village school district has 2,015 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
